title: Listening to the Firehose: Can Voice-First, Two-Way Audio Become a Legitimate Assistive Medium?
thesis: Voice-first, two-way audio agents are technically ready to become a useful complement to screen-based reading for knowledge workers, but only if designers treat them as assistive, user-controlled, and hearing-safe tools—not as replacements for reading or as always-listening ambient companions.

claims.claim: Heavy screen use is widespread among working-age adults and is associated with significant productivity and wellbeing costs, including digital eye strain.

evidence.snippet: American Optometric Association & Deloitte Access Economics, The impact of unmanaged excessive screen time in the United
Kaur et al., Digital Eye Strain – A Comprehensive Review (2022)
Edison Research, The Infinite Dial 2024

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: Listening and reading impose different cognitive demands; audio is generally more transient and pace-dependent, making it a complement rather than a drop-in replacement for reading.

evidence.snippet: American Optometric Association & Deloitte Access Economics, The impact of unmanaged excessive screen time in the United
Kaur et al., Digital Eye Strain – A Comprehensive Review (2022)
Edison Research, The Infinite Dial 2024

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: End-to-end, full-duplex spoken dialogue models have moved from research demos to publicly documented systems with low enough latency for natural turn-taking.

evidence.snippet: American Optometric Association & Deloitte Access Economics, The impact of unmanaged excessive screen time in the United
Kaur et al., Digital Eye Strain – A Comprehensive Review (2022)
Edison Research, The Infinite Dial 2024

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: The value of voice-first audio agents depends more on interaction design—turn-taking, interruption, proactivity, and user agency—than on raw conversational naturalness.

evidence.snippet: American Optometric Association & Deloitte Access Economics, The impact of unmanaged excessive screen time in the United
Kaur et al., Digital Eye Strain – A Comprehensive Review (2022)
Edison Research, The Infinite Dial 2024

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: Proactive and always-listening audio agents risk intrusiveness and attention capture; user-initiated or notification-triggered sessions better preserve agency.

evidence.snippet: American Optometric Association & Deloitte Access Economics, The impact of unmanaged excessive screen time in the United
Kaur et al., Digital Eye Strain – A Comprehensive Review (2022)
Edison Research, The Infinite Dial 2024

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: Voice-first curation can amplify filter-bubble dynamics in a channel with fewer visual cues for verification, so transparency and user control over selection are essential.

evidence.snippet: American Optometric Association & Deloitte Access Economics, The impact of unmanaged excessive screen time in the United
Kaur et al., Digital Eye Strain – A Comprehensive Review (2022)
Edison Research, The Infinite Dial 2024

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.

claims.claim: A trigger-based, off-screen audio review layer is a promising near-term pattern, but it should be treated as a testable hypothesis rather than a proven product design.

evidence.snippet: American Optometric Association & Deloitte Access Economics, The impact of unmanaged excessive screen time in the United
Kaur et al., Digital Eye Strain – A Comprehensive Review (2022)
Edison Research, The Infinite Dial 2024

counterevidence.summary: Counter-evidence and boundary conditions should be added as the article matures and more empirical studies appear.
